title: Logging Gmail in Contacts -- what am I doing wrong?

posts.author: merubin75 (Michael Rubin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using the Contacts template and seem to have it all confiugured properly – except for one detail: emails are not logged in the Emails & Activities area.

Here’s what I’ve done so far:

  • I’ve connected my Gmail account to Monday.com (see screenshot below).
  • I’ve set it to log outgoing emails from Gmail that are bcc’d to the email address (see screenshot below)

image718×868 66.9 KB

  • I created a new contact Jane Doe with the email address jane@doe.org.
  • In Gmail, I forwarded the last message from Jane via bcc to springboardenterprises@crm.monday.com (see the screenshot below)

image1494×686 118 KB

Nothing happens. I don’t see any updates in the Emails & Activities box. What am I doing wrong?

At your service,
Michael
“This chaos is killing me!” - David Bowie
